metadata.description: API testing tools for AI-assisted workflows

plugins.name: tarn
plugins.description: CLI-first API testing tool for .tarn.yaml files with structured JSON output and a bundled MCP server for AI-assisted write/run/debug workflows.

plugins.name: tarn-lsp
plugins.description: Language Server Protocol plugin for Tarn test files (.tarn.yaml) — diagnostics, hover, completion, symbols, navigation, code actions, quick-fix, formatting, JSONPath evaluator.
